title: Python Programming
overview: Learn Python programming from fundamentals to advanced topics including OOP, web scraping, and basic data analysis.
syllabus: Python Basics: syntax, variables, data types
Data Structures: lists, tuples, dicts, sets
Introduction to Data Analysis with pandas

faqs.question: Do I need prior programming experience?
faqs.answer: No. This course is designed for beginners and starts from fundamentals.

faqs.question: Is placement assistance provided?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide placement guidance and resume support.
